logo_design.name: Logo设计

templates.name: 科技公司Logo
templates.base_prompt: modern minimalist tech company logo, clean lines, geometric shapes, professional, vector style, simple color palette

templates.name: 餐饮品牌Logo
templates.base_prompt: restaurant brand logo, appetizing, warm colors, food elements, friendly and inviting

common_rules: 保持简洁，避免过于复杂的细节
确保在不同尺寸下都清晰可辨
考虑黑白版本的可用性

product_image.name: 商品图设计

templates.name: 商品白底图
templates.base_prompt: product photography, pure white background, centered composition, professional lighting, high detail, commercial quality

templates.name: 商品场景图
templates.base_prompt: product in lifestyle scene, natural lighting, realistic environment, appealing composition, commercial photography

common_rules: 产品必须清晰可见，占据画面主要位置
光线均匀，避免过曝或欠曝

id_photo.name: 证件照

templates.name: 标准证件照
templates.base_prompt: professional ID photo, frontal face, neutral expression, proper lighting, clean background, formal attire

common_rules: 人脸必须正面朝向镜头
表情自然，不能有夸张表情

poster_design.name: 海报设计

templates.name: 促销海报
templates.base_prompt: promotional poster design, eye-catching, bold typography, vibrant colors, clear hierarchy, commercial style

common_rules: 信息层级清晰，主次分明
色彩搭配和谐，有视觉冲击力

templates.name: 扁平插画
templates.base_prompt: flat illustration, simple shapes, solid colors, modern style, clean design, vector art

quality_standards: 色彩模式：RGB用于屏幕显示，CMYK用于印刷
文件格式：PNG用于透明背景，JPG用于照片，SVG用于矢量图
design_principles: 对比：通过大小、颜色、形状创造视觉层次
对齐：保持元素整齐排列
重复：统一的视觉元素增强一致性
亲密性：相关元素靠近放置

prompt_optimization.structure: 主体描述 + 风格修饰 + 技术参数 + 质量要求
